rationale.R1.2: The agent identified a load-bearing contradiction and a factual error, thoroughly engaging the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marked uncertainty regarding OGB protocols and provided other uncertain points.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; potential harms were identified.
rationale.RX.5: Clear provenance with sources for claims, minor edits not traced.
